obsidian_intro_body: Obsidian is a free, lightweight app for viewing (and editing) markdown content, used to create interactive campaign guides. It runs on desktop, Android, and iOS. Your mod is written to a folder you choose, ready to open and play.
obsidian_fallback_prefix: If nothing opened, you may need to install Obsidian first -
android_browser_install_blocked: Install the EBR Mod Manager app to download mods on Android.
error_registry_fetch: Could not load the mod registry. Check your internet connection and try again.
error_registry_fetch_server: The mod registry is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few minutes.
error_download_failed: Download failed. The mod may be unavailable.
error_download_not_found: This mod could not be found. It may have been removed.
error_download_server: The server is having trouble. Try again in a few minutes.
error_download_network: Could not reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
error_vault_safety: That folder contains unrecognized files. Choose an empty folder or an existing mod vault.
error_vault_removed: The mod folder was moved or deleted. Choose the folder again to continue.
error_vault_quota: Not enough storage space to install this mod. Free up space and try again.
error_vault_permission: Permission to write to that folder was lost. Tap Install to choose the folder again.
error_extraction_security: This mod contains unsafe content and cannot be installed. Please report it.
error_hash_mismatch: The downloaded mod does not match the expected version. Try again or report this mod.
error_mod_detail_network: Could not load mod details. Check your internet connection and try again.
confirm_replace_vault: This folder already contains a mod. Replace it with {modName}?
zip_download_complete: Downloaded! Extract the zip and open that folder in Obsidian.
dev_panel_explanation: This is a developer tool for testing the mod manager. If you opened this by accident, press Ctrl+` or click X to close it. Regular users do not need this panel.
mod_type_campaign_desc: A complete, standalone campaign built from scratch.
mod_type_enhancement_desc: Focused changes to an existing campaign: fixes, tweaks, and reworks.
mod_type_one_day_mission_desc: A self-contained mission you can play in a single sitting.
mod_type_expansion_desc: New areas, story arcs, and encounters that extend an existing campaign.
mod_type_collection_desc: Several mods hand-merged into one seamless experience.
mod_type_theme_desc: A visual reskin of the play experience, with no content changes.
disclaimer: Earthborne Rangers is copyrighted by Earthborne Games. This website, the mod manager tool, and all associated services are community-created projects. They are not produced by, endorsed by, supported by, or officially affiliated with Earthborne Games.
